rationale.oversight-scaling-inversion: reviewer burden externalized; 30 PRs/6 reviewers; review is bottleneck
rationale.quality-debt: codebase tech-debt, smells, breaking changes from AI slop
rationale.automation-bias: skill-atrophy, over-reliance deskilling of capable developers documented
rationale.hitl-workflow: documented mitigations: PR-size limits, self-review, walkthroughs, dual review
rationale.survey-input: substantive developer perceptions/mitigations useful for org survey
rationale.assistive: discourse covers assistant completions, mandated Cursor snippet generation
rationale.agentic: AI agents producing whole PRs reviewed at gate
rationale.risk-security: discourse reports AuthZ-skip, test-subversion security failures
rationale.risk-quality: quality clause: focal analysis of codebase quality degradation
rationale.risk-overreliance: over-reliance clause: skill-atrophy, comprehension-gap empirically reported
